{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201711011186BF3A3F211901758D"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581853379947922238","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉前面几章是铺垫之类的剧情，但后面真的越来越甜了，好评(o^^o)[害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765291019,"group_id":"7573848134514658329","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2rfSnRzPb2g7rx3Wv84NfETBFONrp06F6nxq9WjyF4T","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1361630368891155","user_name":"楚山的晶晶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1361630368891155","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7573848134514658329","book_info":{"abstract":"某年某月，离国皇长子单连眷对云朝的八皇子一见钟情，于是用了上不了台面的手段娶到了他。
本以为婚后会甜甜蜜蜜的，但李和的身世，神秘的桃源乡，以及十几年前就消失的宸妃，都给这一切打上了神秘的问号。
两人之间有几分真爱，爱中混杂了几分算计，终于在一切尘埃落定之后逐渐显露。
单连眷垂垂老矣的时候，看着面容依旧年轻的李和，颤颤巍巍的举起手：李和，下辈子你还愿意跟我吗？
李和轻抚他银白的发丝，眼里泪光闪烁，
下辈子，我先来爱你。
主cp：忠犬但有自己锋芒的攻×白切黑但骨子里痴情的受，
